SEO.title: Zomaar Zomert — Festival in Itterbeek
SEO.description: Zomaar Zomert is a free summer festival in the heart of Itterbeek. The last weekend of July, enjoy live music, activities and atmosphere at the Sint-Anna church.

openGraph.title: Zomaar Zomert — Festival in Itterbeek
openGraph.description: A free summer festival in the heart of Itterbeek. Live music, activities and atmosphere at the Sint-Anna church.

intro.body: On the last weekend of July, the Sint-Anna church in Itterbeek calls in sick for three days. Live music, cold beer, paella, pétanque and a few thousand friends you haven't met yet. No tickets, no wristbands — just walk in and stretch summer until sundown.

paella.title: Sunday paella
paella.body: Long tables, one giant pan, your neighbours for company. Sign-up required — sells out every year.

petanque.title: Pétanque tournament
petanque.body: Three balls, one sandpit, and your street's honour on the line. Beginners welcome, champions too.

crew.body: Join us as a volunteer or partner.

partners.body: Zomaar Zomert is free because a whole crew of local businesses, volunteers and sponsors keep it that way. Want to help shape the next edition?

cta.body: No tickets. No fuss. Just a summer worth remembering. Follow us on Instagram or drop us a line.
